Mtn Compelling Pltf To Attend Depo
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Mark T. Lobre, Esq. of Allstate (415-281-7110) for Tewik Kridech, Bouraqui Makhlouf, Defendants and moving parties.
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs TEWIK KRIDECH, BOURAQUI MAKHLOUF's Motion Compelling Plaintiff To Attend Deposition is Granted. Defendants' unopposed motion for an order compelling Plaintiff to attend a deposition is Granted. Deposition is to be completed within 30 days. Order is signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Mtn For Order Compelling Pltf To Answer Form Interoggs
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Mark T. Lobre, Esq. of Allstate (415-281-7110) for Tewik Kridech, Bouraqui Makhlouf, Defendants and moving parties.
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs TEWIK KRIDECH, BOURAQUI MAKHLOUF's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interoggatories is Granted. Defendants' unopposed motion for an order compelling Plaintiff to answer form interrogatories and respond to requests for production of documents is GRANTED. Responses and Documents will be served on defendant within 14 days.Order is signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
